name: skillers-suda-codex
description: Codex-native workshop for designing, building, reviewing, and packaging skills or plugin bundles.

interface.shortDescription: Design and build Codex skills or plugins from rough ideas
interface.longDescription: Packages the Codex-native skillers-suda workshop. It turns vague capability ideas into skills or plugin bundles using chat-first scoping, optional multi-agent review, structured design briefs, and lightweight validation.
defaultPrompt: 이 스킬을 검토하고 트리거 설명을 개선해줘.
이 스킬 묶음을 Codex 플러그인 패키지로 설계해줘.
